历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 minimum rankings approximately 18165→14388→14586→14980→13167, with a significant forward shift of about 1800 places in 2025, baseline approximately 13167; provincial enrollment plan was 26 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 30 in 2024, and to 37 in 2025, continuing expansion. The 2026 enrollment plan file was not read and cannot be included in the assessment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant forward shift in rankings and continuous expansion trend in 2025, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will fluctuate slightly around 13167. Due to key data such as the 2026 enrollment plan, candidate scale, and reputation popularity not being read, this prediction has considerable uncertainty. Predicted minimum ranking approximately 13500, range 13000–14000.
